mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(s.create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayAddCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.storage_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inStorageCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN s.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abnormalCount, ROUND( ( SUM(CASE WHEN s.storage_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biomed_storage), 0) ) * 100, 2 ) AS storageUsageRate FROM biomed_sample s

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(s.collect_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS xName, COUNT(*) AS yValue FROM biomed_sample s
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(s.collect_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY xName ASC

SELECT CASE s.status WHEN 0 THEN '待处理' WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '异常' ELSE '其他' END AS xName, COUNT(*) AS yValue FROM biomed_sample s
GROUP BY s.status

SELECT IFNULL(s.source, '未知来源') AS xName, COUNT(*) AS yValue FROM biomed_sample s
GROUP BY s.source ORDER BY yValue DESC

SELECT s.id, s.sample_no AS sampleNo, s.sample_name AS sampleName, s.queue, s.source, s.status, s.collect_time AS collectTime, CASE WHEN s.status = 2 THEN '样本异常' WHEN s.storage_id IS NULL THEN '未入库' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, s.collect_time, NOW()) >= 30 THEN '存放超期' ELSE '关注样本' END AS warningText FROM biomed_sample s
AND ( s.status = 2 OR s.storage_id IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, s.collect_time, NOW()) >= 30 ) ORDER BY s.collect_time DESC LIMIT 10
